catalog_content:
Item Name: Agrimony Alcohol-FREE Liquid Extract, Organic Agrimony (Agrimonia Eupatoria) Glycerite Hawaii Pharm Natural Herbal Supplement 15x4oz
Bullet Point 1: Agrimony Alcohol-FREE liquid extract contains ONLY natural ingredients!
Bullet Point 2: High Quality Agrimony Alcohol-FREE liquid extract - we use classic conventional methods of extraction! We meticulously produce our extracts according to precise standards where each herb is extracted according to the distinct characteristic of each plant!
Bullet Point 3: Super concentrated Agrimony Alcohol-FREE extract: dried material / menstruum ratio is 1:3!
Bullet Point 4: We strictly use Only Certified or ethically sourced wild harvested raw material, vegetable palm glycerin and crystal clear artesian purified water! Really the BEST Agrimony herbal glycerite on market!
Product Description: Agrimony is a perennial herbaceous plant with straight, strong, pubescent stems, reaching a height of 30 to 100 cm. Rough hairs cover the entire plant. The leaves are pinnate. On the top they are dark green and velvety, light green below. In September, small fruits are formed - tenacious achenes.They can cling with their bristles to animal fur and human clothing and spread over long distances.
Value: 60.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Herbal supplement positioned as a premium, high-quality glycerite extract with a strong focus on natural and organic sourcing. The multipack format (15x4oz) suggests a value-driven bulk purchase, appealing to consumers seeking long-term herbal remedy stock. The absence of alcohol and use of artisanal extraction methods elevate its perceived quality, justifying a higher price point in the health supplement segment.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Goya Foods Low Sodium Red Kidney Beans, 15.5 Ounce (Pack of 2)
Bullet Point 1: KIDNEY BEANS CANNED: A versatile and delicious ingredient essential in many traditional dishes, our red kidney beans are an excellent choice thanks to the amazing robust flavor and firm texture that will make them a standout in any recipe.
Bullet Point 2: READY-TO-USE CANNED BEANS: Whether you're preparing a hearty chili or a savory bean salad, Goya Red Kidney Beans are perfect for people with busy lifestyles. Just pop the Easy Open Lid and effortlessly incorporate them into your favorite recipes!
Bullet Point 3: NUTRITIOUS BEANS: These beans are a great way to add more fiber and essential nutrients into your diet, like protein and potassium. Gluten free, fat free, cholesterol free, and trans fat free, they’re a healthy inclusion you can feel good about eating.
Bullet Point 4: PANTRY STAPLE: With their rich and hearty flavor, our beans are a versatile ingredient that can be used in many dishes, from bean soups and casseroles to rice dishes, salads, and more. They can be made into delicious side dishes and hearty entrees.
Bullet Point 5: GOYA FOODS remains firm in its goal of being the brand of choice for authentic Latin cuisine while retaining its family-oriented approach to its consumers and its roots in the culinary traditions of Hispanic communities throughout the world.
Value: 31.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Goya Foods positions this low-sodium red kidney bean product as a premium pantry staple, highlighted by its 'Prime Premium' branding and convenient multipack format (2 cans). The use of metal cans and 'Easy Open Lid' suggests practical, durable packaging suited for both home and busy lifestyles. While the absence of organic or GMO claims may appeal to budget-conscious buyers, the 'gluten-free' label and emphasis on nutritional benefits (protein, fiber, potassium) cater to health-oriented consumers. The multipack deal and established brand trust in Latin cuisine justify a slightly elevated price point compared to generic alternatives.
